ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2009 Continued To Apr-06-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-10-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Sally Morin, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Ayed Arif Razvi, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant David Stone.
Default was entered against defendant on November 18, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 30, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on December 29, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Syed Arif Razvi, and against the Defaulted Defendant David Stone as follows:

Damages/Principal - $41,449.43.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,668.04.
Attorney's Fees - $5,105.60.
Costs - $691.70, for a total judgment in the amount of $50,914.77.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
